## Maintenance Checklist

- [ ] I checked whether `ROADMAP.md` needs an update.
- [ ] I checked whether `CHANGELOG.md` needs an `Unreleased` entry.
- [ ] I checked `ANALYTICS.md` before adding, renaming, or changing analytics events.
